nasb.text: As the living Father sent Me, and I live because of the Father, so he who eats Me, he also will live because of Me.

esv.text: As the living Father sent me, and I live because of the Father, so whoever feeds on me, he also will live because of me.

cnv.text: 正如永活的父差遣了我，我也因父活著；照樣，吃我肉的人也必因我而活。

ccb.text: 永活的父差我来，我是靠祂而活。同样，吃我肉的人也靠我而活。

csbs.text: 永生的父怎样差派了我，我又因父而活，照样，以我为食的人也将因我而活。
